hook: ¿Otro tutorial más y seguís sin entender nada?
angle: Confronta directamente la fatiga del principiante ahogado en información contradictoria de YouTube.
prompt_additions: A dark, moody close-up portrait of a 26-year-old Latino man sitting hunched at a cluttered desk late at night, face lit only by the cold blue glow of a laptop screen showing multiple overlapping YouTube trading tutorials and MT5 indicator chaos. His eyes are tired, brow furrowed, hand pressed against his temple in visible mental exhaustion and defeat. The scene communicates information overload — scattered notebooks with crossed-out notes, empty coffee cup, chart screenshots taped to the wall behind him slightly out of focus. Bold Inter-style white headline overlay in Spanish reads '¿OTRO TUTORIAL MÁS Y SEGUÍS SIN ENTENDER NADA?' with an aggressive amber-red accent underline pulsing below the word 'NADA'. Background is a Carbon Black radial gradient bleeding into the room shadows, high contrast, slightly uncomfortable visual energy with a subtle red vignette at the edges. Photorealistic, cinematic, Apple keynote lighting with one harsh key light from the screen. Portrait framing 4:5, shallow depth of field, grainy realism. No aspirational imagery — pure frustration captured.

hook: Antes: 8 horas pegado al chart. Después: el bot opera mientras dormís.
angle: Contraste visceral entre la esclavitud de la pantalla y la libertad de la automatización 24/7.
prompt_additions: A dramatic vertical split-panel composition, sharp clean dividing line down the center. LEFT PANEL (BEFORE): a 34-year-old exhausted man slumped at a trading desk at 3 AM, four monitors glowing with chaotic XAUUSD candlestick charts, stubble, bloodshot eyes, crumpled energy drink cans, stressed body language, harsh cold blue monitor light casting heavy shadows under his eyes, desaturated amber-gray palette, claustrophobic framing. RIGHT PANEL (AFTER): the same man peacefully asleep in a clean modern bedroom, soft ambient darkness, a single smartphone on the nightstand glowing faintly with a Neon Green #A5F28C profit notification showing '+$847 XAUUSD — automated', moonlight and calm, breathing serenity. Bold Inter-style white headline spans across both panels at the top: 'ANTES: 8 HORAS PEGADO AL CHART.' and at the bottom 'DESPUÉS: EL BOT OPERA MIENTRAS DORMÍS.' Carbon Black radial gradient background behind both frames. Premium fintech cinematography, photorealistic, Apple keynote lighting, high contrast, 4:5 portrait ratio. The emotional arc from exhaustion to peace is the hero.

hook: La misma automatización que usan los fondos. Sin código. Sin equipo.
angle: Apela a su identidad de emprendedor sofisticado — esto no es para retail, es grado institucional simplificado.
prompt_additions: An ultra-premium institutional-grade graphic composition on a Carbon Black radial gradient background (#101010 center to #010101 edges). Centerpiece: a sleek, minimalist algorithmic architecture diagram — clean geometric nodes and connecting lines forming an abstract trading system flowchart, rendered in thin white strokes with selective Neon Green #A5F28C data pulses animating along the connections. In the background, a subtle grid of XAUUSD candlestick data visualizations fading into shadow, monospace ticker data running along the top edge showing 'XAUUSD 2,847.30 +1.42%'. Bold white Inter-style headline centered: 'LA MISMA AUTOMATIZACIÓN QUE USAN LOS FONDOS.' Below in Light Gray #D7D7D7 smaller sans-serif: 'Sin código. Sin equipo. Lifetime access.' A small Electric Blue #2979FF rectangular CTA button at the bottom reads 'VER ESTRATEGIA'. Zero decorative elements, everything functional. Mood: sophisticated, Bloomberg terminal meets Apple keynote, trustworthy, institutional. No people. Typographic and data-driven visual style. Portrait 4:5 framing, generous negative space, razor-sharp detail.

hook: Llevaba 3 años esclavo del chart. Hoy dormí 8 horas y gané $312.
angle: Testimonio auténtico de liberación emocional — el arco de escéptico agotado a creyente descansado.
prompt_additions: A casual, smartphone-style selfie-angle portrait of a 33-year-old Latino man in a slightly wrinkled gray t-shirt, sitting on the edge of his unmade bed in a softly lit bedroom just after waking, morning sunlight streaming through blinds behind him. He's holding his phone up to the camera showing an MT5 mobile app screen with a Neon Green profit of '+$312.40 XAUUSD' while wearing a genuine, slightly disbelieving smile — eyebrows raised, relaxed shoulders, the body language of someone who slept well for the first time in months. Slightly imperfect framing, a bit of natural handheld tilt, authentic UGC feel, muted desaturated bedroom background with a coffee mug on the nightstand. Handwritten-style white overlay text in Spanish reads 'Llevaba 3 años esclavo del chart. Hoy dormí 8 horas y gané $312.' No heavy branding, minimal production value, raw and emotional. Warm morning light, soft shadows, iPhone-style natural photo quality, slight grain. Photorealistic UGC aesthetic, portrait 4:5, handheld authenticity, zero polish.

angle: Elimina la barrera psicológica del principiante con una declaración provocadora que invierte la expectativa del trading.
prompt_additions: A maximum-impact billboard-style composition dominated by massive bold white Inter typography. The Spanish headline 'EMPEZÁ SIN SABER NADA.' occupies 90% of the frame, rendered in ultra-bold sans-serif with tight letter tracking, pure white against a Carbon Black radial gradient background (#101010 center fading to #010101 exterior). The word 'NADA' is highlighted in Neon Green #A5F28C for emphasis. A single thin Neon Green candlestick chart line runs faintly behind the type as a subtle background decoration, barely visible. At the very bottom in small Light Gray #D7D7D7 text: 'Bot plug-and-play — XAUUSD.' A tiny Electric Blue #2979FF CTA button reads 'EMPEZAR $147'. Extreme negative space, minimalist, Apple keynote billboard energy. No people, no illustrations — pure typographic power. Photorealistic graphic design aesthetic, razor-sharp rendering, premium fintech mood, portrait 4:5 framing. The type IS the image.

hook: 5 razones por las que tu próximo ingreso debería ser pasivo
angle: Habla el idioma del emprendedor digital — diversificación, ingresos pasivos, escalar sin tiempo extra.
prompt_additions: A clean, premium vertical listicle graphic on Carbon Black radial gradient background. At the top, a bold white Inter-style headline in Spanish: '5 RAZONES POR LAS QUE TU PRÓXIMO INGRESO DEBERÍA SER PASIVO'. Below, five list items left-aligned with generous spacing, each preceded by a minimalist Neon Green #A5F28C checkmark icon: '01. Opera 24/7 sin tu atención' / '02. Elimina decisiones emocionales' / '03. Diversifica en oro (XAUUSD)' / '04. Pago único, acceso de por vida' / '05. Mientras escalás tu negocio, el bot escala tu capital'. The last item is slightly larger and accented in Neon Green for emphasis. Item text in clean white Inter Regular, numbers in Light Gray #A7A7A7 monospace. Subtle candlestick chart motif fading into the lower-right background as decoration. Small Electric Blue #2979FF CTA button at the bottom: 'ACCEDER POR $147'. Minimalist composition, scannable hierarchy, no people, pure typographic/graphic treatment. Apple keynote premium aesthetic, portrait 4:5 framing, generous negative space, razor-sharp rendering.

hook: Perdés trades por fatiga. El bot no se cansa nunca.
angle: PAS puro — nombra la fatiga emocional, intensifica el costo real, entrega el alivio de la disciplina robótica.
prompt_additions: A three-section vertical panel composition flowing top to bottom with a dramatic color/mood transition. TOP SECTION (PAIN): dark heavy Carbon Black with a blurred image of a tired man's eyes reflecting red candles crashing on a chart, red accent, white Inter headline reads 'PERDÉS TRADES POR FATIGA.' MIDDLE SECTION (AGITATE): chaotic amber-tinted visual with overlapping XAUUSD chart fragments, a clock showing 3:47 AM, a coffee cup, scattered energy in motion blur, amber/orange accent, white headline reads 'CADA DECISIÓN EMOCIONAL TE CUESTA SUEÑO, DINERO Y SALUD.' BOTTOM SECTION (SOLVE): clean, calm, bright Carbon Black with a single glowing Neon Green #A5F28C candlestick rising steadily, crisp minimalist negative space, white headline reads 'EL BOT OPERA POR REGLAS. SIN EMOCIÓN. SIN PAUSA.' and a small Electric Blue #2979FF CTA button 'AUTOMATIZAR AHORA'. Smooth gradient transitions between sections from black-red → amber-chaos → black-neon green relief. Photorealistic/graphic hybrid style, cinematic lighting, premium fintech aesthetic, portrait 4:5 framing. The emotional descent-and-rise is the hero.

hook: Mi primera semana sin saber configurar MT5
angle: Hace creíble que un principiante total pueda tener resultados reales — el screenshot es la prueba.
prompt_additions: A hyper-realistic iPhone 15 Pro mockup photographed at a slight candid tilt, held loosely in a young man's hand visible only at the edge of frame, shot in a natural home environment with a softly blurred bedroom desk in the background. The screen displays a realistic MT5 mobile app interface in light mode showing a XAUUSD account summary: account balance of $1,247.83, weekly profit highlighted in green '+$184.60 (+17.3%)', a list of 7 closed trades all showing positive green outcomes with timestamps spread across a week, realistic platform UI elements including status bar showing 9:47 AM, battery at 84%, WiFi signal. A small handwritten-style white arrow with casual text annotation points to the weekly profit number with the Spanish caption 'mi primera semana sin saber configurar MT5'. Slightly messy candid feel — the phone isn't perfectly centered, a small coffee stain on the desk visible, a notebook edge in frame. No brand overlays, no heavy production — maximum believability. Natural indoor morning light, warm tones, photorealistic smartphone photography aesthetic, portrait 4:5 framing. The screenshot tells the entire story.

hook: Cómo un emprendedor digital convirtió el excedente de su negocio en oro automatizado
angle: Formato advertorial que baja la resistencia publicitaria y posiciona el bot como decisión inteligente de inversión, no como producto de trading.
prompt_additions: A sophisticated editorial magazine-style layout mimicking a premium financial publication like Bloomberg Businessweek or Monocle. At the top, a small 'Sponsored' label in muted gray beside a fictional publication logo reading 'THE CAPITAL BRIEF'. Below, a large serif headline in deep black on an off-white newsprint background: 'Cómo un emprendedor digital convirtió el excedente de su negocio en oro automatizado'. A column of body text in clean serif below, with a visible drop cap 'E' and a pull quote in italic serif reading 'No tenía tiempo para otro proyecto — necesitaba que el dinero trabajara solo.' attributed to 'Martín R., fundador de agencia digital, Buenos Aires'. To the right, an editorial-style photograph: a 32-year-old Latino entrepreneur in a minimalist home office wearing a charcoal sweater, looking thoughtfully at a laptop displaying a clean XAUUSD chart with upward momentum, warm natural window light, muted editorial color grading, shot like a documentary portrait. Below the article, a small understated link in serif italics reads 'Conocer la estrategia →' in subtle Electric Blue #2979FF. Two-column newspaper grid, generous margins, sophisticated typography mixing Playfair Display-style serif headlines with clean body text. Photorealistic editorial aesthetic, muted cream/gray palette, portrait 4:5 framing. Looks like a real article, not an ad.

hook: Cientos de principiantes ya dejaron de quemar cuentas demo
angle: Reduce el miedo del principiante mostrando que gente como él ya cruzó el puente — no está solo, y funciona.
prompt_additions: A premium stacked testimonial mosaic on Carbon Black radial gradient background. Centered headline in bold white Inter: 'CIENTOS DE PRINCIPIANTES YA DEJARON DE QUEMAR CUENTAS DEMO'. Below, five slightly offset testimonial cards arranged in a mosaic layout with subtle Neon Green #A5F28C connective accent lines between them. Each card has a dark charcoal background with rounded corners, soft white text, and includes: a small avatar circle with initials, a name like 'Matías G.', a 5-star rating in Neon Green, and a quote. Card 1: Llevaba 8 meses perdiendo en demo. Con el bot, mi primera semana real cerré +$94. — Matías G., 24'. Card 2: 'No sabía ni abrir una operación en MT5. Seguí el tutorial y listo.' — Camila F., 29'. Card 3: '+$2,847 en 3 semanas — cuenta real XAUUSD'. Card 4: 'Dejé de ver 50 videos por día de YouTubers. — Javier M., 27'. Card 5 larger at the bottom: 'Por fin algo que funciona mientras aprendo. — Lucía P., 31 — ★★★★★'. Subtle Neon Green thread visually connecting the stack. Small Electric Blue #2979FF CTA at bottom: 'UNIRME AL GRUPO'. Clean, premium fintech aesthetic, photorealistic graphic composition, Apple keynote lighting, portrait 4:5 framing, generous negative space. No people — just the stack of proof.

angle: El emprendedor digital piensa en ROI y métricas — un número verificado hace el trabajo emocional y lógico a la vez.
prompt_additions: A minimalist data-viz composition on Carbon Black radial gradient background (#101010 center to #010101 exterior). Centered and dominating 60% of the frame, a massive number rendered in Neon Green #A5F28C using ultra-bold Inter typography: '73.4%' with razor-sharp edges and subtle luminous glow. Directly below in smaller bold white Inter: 'WIN RATE VERIFICADO'. Below that in Light Gray #D7D7D7 monospace small text: 'Backtest XAUUSD — Ene 2022 a Dic 2024 · 1,847 operaciones · Lifetime access $147'. Behind the hero number, extremely subtle gridlines and a faint minimalist candlestick chart pattern fading into the shadows as background decoration, barely visible. A thin Neon Green horizontal line underlines the stat. Small Electric Blue #2979FF CTA button at the bottom: 'VER BACKTEST'. Zero clutter, institutional data-visualization aesthetic, Bloomberg terminal meets Apple keynote. No people, pure typographic and data composition. Photorealistic sharp rendering, premium fintech mood, portrait 4:5 framing, generous negative space. The number is the hero.

angle: Ataca la aversión al riesgo del principiante con un compromiso financiero mínimo y claridad total de costo.
prompt_additions: A premium offer-driven composition on Carbon Black radial gradient background. Centered, a clean rectangular price card with subtle rounded corners and a soft Neon Green #A5F28C glow outline. Inside the card, bold white Inter headline: '$147 UNA VEZ.' directly below in slightly smaller Neon Green #A5F28C bold: 'OPERA PARA SIEMPRE.' Above the price, a small strike-through in Light Gray #A7A7A7 reads 'normalmente $197' with a crossed-out line. Below the main price, four short bullet lines in Light Gray #D7D7D7 with tiny Neon Green checkmarks: '✓ Acceso de por vida' / '✓ Pago único — sin suscripción' / '✓ Bot + tutorial + video guía' / '✓ Funciona mientras aprendés'. A small ribbon-style badge in the upper corner of the card in Neon Green reads 'LAUNCH PRICE'. Below the entire card, a prominent Electric Blue #2979FF CTA button with white bold text: 'ACCEDER AHORA'. Subtle ambient Neon Green candlestick chart motif fading into the background shadows as decoration. High contrast, premium promotional energy without feeling cheap, Apple keynote staging. No people, pure graphic/typographic composition. Photorealistic sharp rendering, portrait 4:5 framing, premium fintech mood, generous negative space.
